summary: Tested Products dropdown enhancement across marketing pages. Main homepage and pitch pages have correct 11-item Products dropdown with 3 sections. However, SEO page, Store Reviews page, and Pricing page have incomplete desktop Products dropdown with only 8 items (missing Store Reviews, Voice Notes, SEO & AEO, and 'Personal Landing Pages' renamed to 'Link Pages'). Mobile menu is correct on all pages with all 11 items.

ui_bugs.issue: SEO page, Store Reviews page, and Pricing page have incomplete Products dropdown with only 8 items instead of 11. Missing: Store Reviews, Voice Notes, SEO & AEO. Also 'Personal Landing Pages' is incorrectly named 'Link Pages'
Third section label shows 'Intelligence' instead of 'Visibility & Intelligence' on affected pages

action_items: Update desktop Products dropdown on /marketing/seo/index.html to include all 11 items in 2-column layout with 3 sections matching main homepage
Update desktop Products dropdown on /marketing/store-reviews/index.html to include all 11 items
Update desktop Products dropdown on /marketing/pricing/index.html to include all 11 items
Rename 'Link Pages' to 'Personal Landing Pages' on affected pages
Rename 'Digital Cards' to 'Digital Business Cards' on affected pages
Change section label from 'Intelligence' to 'Visibility & Intelligence' on affected pages
critical_code_review_comments: Main homepage (/marketing/) has correct Products dropdown with all 11 items in 2-column layout
Pitch pages (/pitch/real-estate/) have correct Products dropdown with all 11 items
Mobile menu on all pages correctly shows all 11 items
SEO page content is correct (title, hero with green accent, 6+ feature cards, AEO section)
Store Reviews page content is correct (title, hero with orange accent, 6 feature cards, how-it-works section)
Automotive link correctly points to /dealers/ instead of /salespresentation/

success_rate.frontend: 70% - Main features work but desktop Products dropdown incomplete on SEO, Store Reviews, and Pricing pages

test_credentials: No login required - public static HTML pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Desktop Products dropdown needs to be updated on /marketing/seo/, /marketing/store-reviews/, and /marketing/pricing/ pages to include all 11 items with correct naming and 3 section labels. The correct template is in /marketing/build/index.html lines 207-232. Mobile menu is correct on all pages.
